hcp.title: HCP Profiles
hcp.emptyBody: Create your first HCP profile to start building training scenarios.
hcp.deleteConfirm: Delete HCP Profile: This will permanently remove this profile and unassign it from all scenarios. This action cannot be undone.

scenarios.title: Training Scenarios
scenarios.emptyBody: Create your first training scenario by assigning an HCP profile and configuring key messages.
scenarios.deleteConfirm: Delete Scenario: This will permanently remove this scenario. Existing session history will be preserved.

rubrics.title: Scoring Rubrics
rubrics.emptyBody: Create your first scoring rubric to define custom scoring criteria for training scenarios.
rubrics.deleteConfirm: Delete Rubric: This will permanently remove this rubric. Scenarios using the default rubric will fall back to their configured weights.
rubrics.name: Rubric Name

azureConfig.title: Azure Service Configuration
azureConfig.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Verify the endpoint and API key are correct.

errors.hcpSaveFailed: Could not save HCP profile. Check required fields and try again.
errors.scenarioSaveFailed: Could not save scenario. Check required fields and try again.
errors.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Verify the endpoint and API key are correct.
errors.rubricSaveFailed: Could not save rubric. Check required fields and try again.
